signals.signal_title: Coterra closes two Delaware Basin acquisitions late 2024 — active IT integration demand
signals.signal_description: Coterra Energy closed two Delaware Basin bolt-on acquisitions in late 2024, adding Permian acreage to complement existing Marcellus and Anadarko Basin operations. Post-acquisition IT integration of production data, land, and ERP systems creates near-term IT spend demand across a multi-basin portfolio.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $7.35B — multi-basin E&P (Permian Delaware, Marcellus, Anadarko). Only 957 employees — extremely lean for revenue scale. Houston HQ in STOLA — clean account. No CIO, MSP, CoE, or AI programs identified. Two Delaware Basin acquisitions late 2024 = active IT integration demand. ai_maturity=5. Confidence LOW. WWT opportunity: Houston STOLA, no MSP — but extremely lean workforce limits IT spend scale.
